title: Dualization of the Hopf algebra of secondary cohomology operations and the Adams spectral sequence
abstract: AbstractWe describe the dualization of the algebra of secondary cohomology operations in terms of generators extending the Milnor dual of the Steenrod algebra. In this way we obtain explicit formulæ for the computation of the E3-term of the Adams spectral sequence converging to the stable homotopy groups of spheres.
